# DLA CAGE review response — UEI XF73FG8CVMX1 (draft)

**Received:** 2026-07-09 from CAGEReview@dla.mil (auto-generated review letter).
**Deadline:** reply within **3 business days** (send by ~2026-07-14; sooner is better —
a missed reply returns the registration to Work in Progress and forces a resubmit).
**How to send:** REPLY to the original CAGE email from `beford@silverlinesleep.com`,
**keeping the subject line exactly as received** (they track by it).

## Attachments to include (all already in hand / 5 minutes to capture)

1. **TX SOS Certificate of Formation** — Continental Silverline Products, LLC,
   TX SOS file 0802357166 (plain copy obtained from SOSDirect 2026-06-29, order
   1601151800003; local file `Item_1_Document_646767720002.PDF`). Satisfies
   "Articles of Organization or Incorporation."
2. **Status screenshot dated today** — because CAGE wants LBN documentation
   "dated within the last 12 months," also capture a screenshot of the entity's
   **Active / in-good-standing status** (Texas Comptroller *Taxable Entity
   Search* result for file 0802357166 showing right to transact business =
   ACTIVE, and/or the SOSDirect record) **with the computer clock/date visible
   in the screenshot** (their explicit requirement).
3. **TX SOS Certificate of Merger** (local file `Item_1_Document_646767150002.PDF`)
   — documents the predecessor lineage for the co-location/name-history answer.

**Do NOT attach anything from the IRS** (their letter twice says IRS docs are
not accepted).

## Email body (copy below the line, review bracketed items, attach the 3 files)

---

To the DLA CAGE Review Team:

Responses to each item in your letter regarding UEI XF73FG8CVMX1,
CONTINENTAL SILVERLINE PRODUCTS, LLC, follow.

**1. Legal Business Name documentation (LLC)**

Attached please find:

- The Texas Secretary of State **Certificate of Formation** for Continental
  Silverline Products, LLC (Texas SOS file number 0802357166, formed
  12/28/2015, effective 12/31/2015), plain copy issued by the Texas Secretary
  of State (SOSDirect) on June 29, 2026.
- A **screenshot captured today showing the entity's ACTIVE / in-good-standing
  status** with the Texas Secretary of State / Texas Comptroller, including the
  on-screen date and timestamp.

**2. Co-location — "CONTINENTAL SILVER-LINE PRODUCTS" (CAGE 19865) at 710 N Drennan St**

That listing is a **legacy record of this same business under a former name at
the same address** — it is not a separate or affiliated third-party company.
The entity's lineage at 710 N Drennan St is:

- Continental Silver-Line Products (historical trade/legal styling, per your
  legacy record CAGE 19865);
- Continental Silverline Products, L.P. (Texas SOS file 0800622900); which was
- **merged with and into Continental Silverline Products, LLC (Texas SOS file
  0802357166), the surviving entity, effective 12/31/2015.** The Texas
  Secretary of State **Certificate of Merger is attached** as legal
  documentation of this succession.

**Written statement regarding open Federal Government contracts:** Continental
Silverline Products, LLC states that there are **no open Federal Government
contracts** under any previous company name (including Continental Silver-Line
Products and Continental Silverline Products, L.P.). Accordingly, per your
letter, the attached Certificate of Merger is provided as the supporting legal
documentation for the name succession.

**3. Physical address**

The SAM physical address is correct and complete as listed:
**710 N Drennan St, Houston, TX 77003-1321.** There is no suite, building, or
unit number. (Please note the current ZIP is **77003**; the 77001 ZIP shown on
the legacy CAGE 19865 record is outdated.)

**4. Location type**

710 N Drennan St is a **manufacturing plant and warehouse owned and operated by
Continental Silverline Products, LLC** (mattress manufacturing). It is not a
virtual office, business incubator, residential home office, or rental suite.

**5. Majority of business operations**

Yes. The majority of the company's business operations — manufacturing,
administration, sales, and shipping — are conducted from this location.

**6. Point of Contact verification**

- Blake Ford is an **[officer / employee — state exact title, e.g. "officer of
  the company"]** of Continental Silverline Products, LLC — not a company name,
  department, or government official.
- The email address **beford@silverlinesleep.com** is a valid business email
  assigned specifically to Blake Ford, on the company's own domain
  (silverlinesleep.com), matching the domain of the company website. It is not
  a generic group mailbox.
- The phone number provided in the registration is a valid business number that
  reaches Blake Ford directly (it is not a generic sales or marketing line).

Please let me know if any further information or documentation is required.

Respectfully,

Blake Ford
[Title], Continental Silverline Products, LLC
beford@silverlinesleep.com
[phone as listed in the SAM registration]
